name:
ORDINARY TIME 03 [A]
WORD OF GOD Sunday

readings.summary: The Lord brings light to the darkness.

readings.citation:
Ps 27:1, 4, 13-14, R. v.1a
The Lord is my light and my salvation.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 27:1, 4, 13-14, R. v.1a
The Lord is my light and my salvation.

readings.summary:
Jesus proclaimed the Gospel of the kingdom
and cured every disease among the people.
Jesus begins his public ministry, calling the Apostles.

antiphons.text:
O sing a new song to the Lord;
sing to the Lord, all the earth.
In his presence are majesty and splendor,
strength and honor in his holy place.

Look toward the Lord and be radiant;
let your faces not be abashed.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option II | Cf. Jn 8:12
